name: python3-pptx
title: python3-pptx
summary: Create Open XML PowerPoint documents in Python (Python 3)
description:
Create Open XML PowerPoint documents in Python (Python 3)
This package contains a Python library for creating and updating PowerPoint
(.pptx) files.
.
A typical use would be generating a customized PowerPoint presentation from
database content, downloadable by clicking a link in a web application.
Several developers have used it to automate production of presentation-ready
engineering status reports based on information held in their work management
system. It could also be used for making bulk updates to a library of
presentations or simply to automate the production of a slide or two that
would be tedious to get right by hand.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pptx because Create Open XML PowerPoint documents in Python (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pptx as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pptx with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pptx --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
